projects.title: Pushfolio
projects.summary: An AI agent pipeline that reads GitHub commit history and auto-publishes structured project summaries to a personal portfolio page.
projects.problem_solved: Commit history contains real problem-solving evidence but no tool surfaces it in a readable narrative form.
projects.how_i_solved_it: Built a three-subagent pipeline — fetcher, analyzer, publisher — where hotspot files (highest commit count) drive the 'challenge' narrative rather than README alone.

projects.title: Cross-Border Exchange Platform
projects.summary: A B2B platform connecting Thai suppliers with Myanmar buyers, handling catalog, orders, payments, and logistics across two currencies.
projects.problem_solved: Currency handling between THB and MMK required precise minor-unit arithmetic that kept producing rounding errors across service boundaries.
projects.how_i_solved_it: Introduced a dedicated Money value object with explicit minor-unit conversion logic, eliminating implicit float arithmetic across the payment flow.
